creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
There is some progress through ...

After installing emulators/wine (6.0.2,1 currently) and installing 32bit wine version under ~/.i386-wine-pkg and starting with fresh ~/.wine dir I got following results:

- Colin McRae Rally 2.0 - does not start at all now
- Baldur's Gate I: EE - still no sound at all
- Fallout 2 (GOG) - everything works along with proper sound
- Heroes III: Complete - everything works along with proper sound

The Quake 2 demo remains 'broken' as reported a post earlier.

Not sure how that makes progress in this PR but just wanted to report it.
